items.event_title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico
items.text_on_image: Světový fotbalový večer / World Football Night
items.image_prompt:
Melody4U visual style guide:
Melody4U target image style:
- High-impact commercial social media poster, not a generic AI illustration.
- Premium cinematic advertising look with a finished campaign-poster feel.
- Vertical 9:16 composition for Facebook, TikTok, Instagram Reels and Stories.
- Strong central subject, clear foreground / midground / background layers and obvious visual hierarchy.
- Bold large headline typography that is readable on a mobile screen.
- Neon purple, magenta, blue and dark stadium/night tones as the Melody4U brand energy.
- Emotional fan, gift or remembrance moment connected to the event.
- Smartphone clearly visible as the Melody4U product/action anchor, showing a music gift or personal wish concept.
- Glowing sound waves, music notes, waveform UI, light streaks, particles, glow, lens flare and depth.
- Realistic or cinematic semi-realistic rendering with dramatic lighting and high contrast.
- Energetic but clean composition with a clear call-to-action/product feeling, without overcrowding.
- Facebook / TikTok / Instagram Reels ready and suitable for manual social posting.

Avoid:
- Flat vector illustration.
- Childish cartoon style.
- Simple flat orange poster.
- Empty composition.
- Weak typography.
- Tiny unreadable text.
- Generic stock poster.
- Bland single-object composition.
- Official logos.
- Official badges.
- Real athlete faces.
- Celebrity likenesses.
- Exact trademarked visual identity.
- Fake official tournament branding.
- Too much text.
- Graphic or disturbing imagery.

Create a premium cinematic vertical 9:16 social media campaign poster suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels and Facebook. The result must look like a professional Melody4U social ad, not a simple illustration or generic AI poster. Use layered cinematic composition, dramatic lighting, depth, particles, glow, lens flare, high contrast, and neon purple/magenta/blue Melody4U brand energy. Use a strong central subject, big bold mobile-readable headline typography, and a visible smartphone as the product/action anchor showing a Melody4U music gift or personal wish concept. Add glowing music notes, sound waves, waveform UI or light trails. Visible text must be exactly: "World Football Night". Do not add other large text, invented match details, dates, times, groups, fake scores, team names or extra slogans. Small generic phone UI text may say only "Create Gift" or "Create a music gift". Visible text language: English-only visible text. Tone: fan_hype (energetic, exciting, vivid, social-media friendly, symbolic fan atmosphere). Composition type fan_with_phone: a Czech fan with a smartphone in the foreground, energetic but symbolic stadium atmosphere, no team marks. Theme: FIFA World Cup 2026: Czechia vs Mexico. Marketing angle: personal Melody4U music gift. Football / Czech match direction: dramatic stadium night, Czech fan energy, symbolic football players or fan silhouettes, safe symbolic flags/colors if needed, smartphone with Melody4U gift/music message, no real player faces, no official badges, no official FIFA branding, avoid exact national crests. Restrictions: no official logos, no official badges, no copyrighted team badges, no real athlete faces, no real celebrity likenesses, no exact trademarked visual identity, no graphic or disturbing imagery, no sensationalism. Avoid flat vector art, simple illustration, childish cartoon, bland orange poster, weak composition, low-detail background, minimal poster, generic stock art, fake official logos, fake team badges, real athlete faces, exact official uniforms, excessive text.
items.reels_text: World Football Night — create a personal Melody4U music wish for this moment.
